case_title: PASQUALE R. KRESS VS. WORLD CLASS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A COLORADO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRESS, PASQUALE R. AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD CLASS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A COLORADO CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRESS, PASQUALE R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORLD CLASS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A COLORADO CORPORATION $7,540.05 PRINCIPAL, $45.69 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,765.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
